name: GIGABYTE Z790 GAMING X AX ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7600(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - Intel 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE Z790 GAMING X AX ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe
description: ATX gaming motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and comprehensive M.2 and connectivity options.
